queries.question: Give me the play titles and genres for each theatre.
queries.sql: SELECT Plays.title, Plays.genre  from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id   GROUP BY TheatrePerformances.playId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TheatrePerformances.theatreId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theatres)

queries.question: Give me the play titles and genres for each theatre.
queries.sql: select theatres.name , plays.title , plays.genre from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title ?genre WHERE {
  ?theatreperformances a :TheatrePerformances .
  ?plays a :Play .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasPlays ?plays .
  ?theatres a :Theatre .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasTheatres ?theatres .
  ?theatres p:name ?name .
  ?plays p:title ?title .
  ?plays p:genre ?genre .
}

queries.question: For each theatre, what is the corresponding genre of play?
queries.sql: select theatres.name , plays.genre from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?genre WHERE {
  ?theatreperformances a :TheatrePerformances .
  ?plays a :Play .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasPlays ?plays .
  ?theatres a :Theatre .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasTheatres ?theatres .
  ?theatres p:name ?name .
  ?plays p:genre ?genre .
}

queries.question: Show me the theatre and the corresponding play title.
queries.sql: select theatres.name , plays.title from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?theatreperformances a :TheatrePerformances .
  ?plays a :Play .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasPlays ?plays .
  ?theatres a :Theatre .
  ?theatreperformances p:hasTheatres ?theatres .
  ?theatres p:name ?name .
  ?plays p:title ?title .
}

queries.question: Give me the play title for each theatre.
queries.sql: SELECT Plays.title  from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id   GROUP BY TheatrePerformances.playId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TheatrePerformances.theatreId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theatres)

queries.question: What is the genre of play that is common to all theatres?
queries.sql: SELECT Plays.genre  from TheatrePerformances join Plays on TheatrePerformances.playId = Plays.id join Theatres on TheatrePerformances.theatreId = Theatres.id   GROUP BY TheatrePerformances.playId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TheatrePerformances.theatreId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theatres)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the genre of plays for each theatre.
Give me the play title for each theatre.
Give me the play titles and genres for each theatre.
